title: Tile Adhesive Calculator
shortDescription: Calculate how many kilograms and bags of tile adhesive you need for a given area and layer thickness.
metaTitle: Tile Adhesive Calculator | kg and bags needed
metaDescription: Estimate tile adhesive consumption in kg and bags. Enter area, consumption rate, layer thickness, waste percentage, and bag weight for a clear, easy-to-check result.
intro: Use this tile adhesive calculator to quickly estimate how much adhesive you need for tiling. It shows the amount without waste, with waste included, and how many bags to buy.
overview: The calculator uses a simple formula based on area, adhesive consumption per 1 mm, layer thickness, waste allowance, and bag weight. It is designed to be easy to audit for renovation, finishing, and tiling projects.
howItWorks: Enter the tile area in square meters.
Set the adhesive consumption per 1 mm in kg/m²/mm.
Provide the adhesive layer thickness in millimeters.
Add a waste percentage for cuts, unevenness, and application losses.
Enter the bag weight to calculate how many bags you need.
useCases: Estimating adhesive for bathroom, kitchen, or hallway tiling.
Planning material purchases before a renovation starts.
Checking how many bags of adhesive are needed for a specific tile system.
Comparing adhesive demand for different layer thicknesses.

examples.title: Simple formula
examples.input: Area × consumption per mm × layer thickness
examples.output: Base adhesive amount in kg before waste.
examples.description: This gives the net adhesive requirement for the surface you plan to cover.

examples.title: With waste
examples.description: Adds a practical reserve for losses and uneven substrate.

examples.title: Bags needed
examples.input: Total kg ÷ bag weight, rounded up
examples.description: Always round up so you do not run short on site.

faq.question: How do I calculate tile adhesive needed?
faq.answer: Multiply the area by the adhesive consumption per 1 mm and by the layer thickness. Then add the waste percentage and divide by the bag weight to get the number of bags.

faq.question: Why should I add waste?
faq.answer: Waste covers mixing losses, uneven floors or walls, and small application differences. A small reserve helps avoid buying too little.

faq.question: Should I round bags up?
faq.answer: Yes. Bags should always be rounded up to the next whole number because you cannot buy part of a bag.

seo.title: Tile Adhesive Calculator
seo.description: Estimate how many kg and bags of tile adhesive you need. Calculate adhesive without waste, with waste, and the number of bags from area, consumption rate, layer thickness, and bag weight.
